data.title: Mempool: No so-called encryption recovery service is provided. Beware of phishing email scams
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin mining pool and blockchain browser mempool posted on the X platform that the project does not provide any so-called "encryption recovery service" and any phishing emails using its logo and claiming to be from "mempool recovery" are scams.
Remind the community to be vigilant and never interact with unverified links.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of $25.2228 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 15 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 6, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$25.2228 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$15.8559 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$4.855 billion.
The second is Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$9.3668 million. Currently, ETH's total net inflow has reached US$694 million.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.40 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 3.11%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.327 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $47.8225 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETF IBIT experiencing a net outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 6, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 47.8225 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Bitwise ETF BITB, with a single-day net inflow of 31.8127 million US dollars. Currently, BITB's total net inflow in history has reached 1.972 billion US dollars.
The second is Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of 22.7748 million US dollars. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow in history has reached 11.438 billion US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net outflow of 130 million US dollars. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached 48.65 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$125.582 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 6.05%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.24 billion.

data.title: Data: USDC circulation increased by about 100 million in the past 7 days
data.description: According to official data, in the 7 days ending June 5, Circle issued about 3.2 billion USDC, redeemed about 3.1 billion USDC, and the circulation increased by about 100 million. The total circulation of USDC is 61.1 billion, and the reserve is about 61.3 billion US dollars, of which about 8.2 billion is in cash, and the Circle Reserve Fund holds about 53.1 billion US dollars.

data.title: Japan’s SBI Holdings pours $50 million into stablecoin giant Circle
data.description:
In a lucrative initial public offering (IPO) on the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday and Friday, Circle Internet Group stock soared, with the stablecoin issuer seeing a sizable investment from Japan’s financial services giant, SBI Holdings. Tokyo-based mega-business SBI Holdings has reportedly invested $50 million in Circle Internet Group’s stock, via its launch Thursday […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japans-sbi-holdings-50-million-circle/

data.title: How DeFi Is Powering the Future of DAOs
data.description:
DAOs (decentralized autonomous organizations) have been gaining momentum as a new way for communities, projects and even businesses to organize themselves on the blockchain. Unlike traditional organizations where decisions come from a centralized leader or board, DAOs allow members to participate directly in decision-making through voting.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/06/how-defi-is-powering-the-future-of-daos/

data.title: A whale redeemed about 25,000 SOL and transferred it to Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale user has redeemed 25,008 SOL worth $3.7 million and transferred 25,000 SOL to Binance. The whale user has redeemed a total of 125,045 SOL in the past two months. It has been staking for 4 years. The whale user currently still holds 1,176,375 SOL worth $174.17 million.

data.title: Trump: The result of the appointment of the new Federal Reserve Chairman will be announced soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said in an interview with reporters that the appointment result of the next Federal Reserve Chairman will be announced soon, and he has a fairly clear idea of ​​the candidate. He added that a good Federal Reserve Chairman will lower interest rates. In addition, when asked if he would consider cutting government contracts held by Musk, Trump said he would consider everything. He said that there was no plan to talk to Musk and hoped that he would succeed in Tesla. (Jinshi Data)

data.title: Chainlink Price Prediction: LINK Whale Moves $5.8M, Raising Selling Pressure
data.description:
Chainlink (LINK) price has attracted attention recently following recent on-chain activity from whale 0x7fBB. Since May 27, 2025, the whale put 403,000 LINK tokens into Binance, costing about $5. 87 million. This has caused many to worry that a big sell-off by the investor could place pressure on the market
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/chainlink-price-prediction-link-whale-moves-5-8m-raising-selling-pressure/
